name: Docker Compose Helper
description: Validates docker-compose.yml files and optionally injects health checks and dependency ordering for reliable devcontainer service startup

validate.description: Validate the docker-compose.yml syntax using docker compose config

healthChecks.description: Add health check stanzas to services that are dependencies of other services

dependsOnOrdering.description: Rewrite depends_on to use condition: service_healthy instead of simple service lists
